explanation: Inserted quotes around the file path to test if the Sigma rule detects the command with additional formatting.
Substituted '/r' with '/R' to test if the Sigma rule is case-insensitive in detecting the recursive flag.
Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to argument order.
Added an optional '/d y' flag to test if the Sigma rule can differentiate between optional and required elements.
Original command line for reference, included to ensure the test environment has a baseline.
